name: Live Control-Flow Wiring Lab
description: Step four branch-covering probes through a transient debugger, then physically wire the complete directed control-flow graph.
natural_language: Step all four transient probes through the debugger, remember each erased branch, then drag every output cord to reconstruct and validate the complete controller.

metadata.notes: A nine-node controller with two generated decisions exposes opaque dispatch ports. Four branch-covering debugger traces reveal transient destinations before the operator drags and validates a replay-graded ten-cord harness.
